name: Monster: Bad Apple
desc: Honestly idc what anni fucking says this shit rocks. Tastes very similarly to apple juice (its in the name) but carbonated and caffeine (my beloved). If u like apples then this is a solid pick.

name: Monster: Rio Punch
desc: This makes me wanna bust a fat one rn istg. This is one of my most favorite and probably one of the best flavors its so goooood. It kinda tastes like tutti frutti and some other flavor that i dont know but makes my tongue and brain go oooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooh.
